title: EasyCrawl
description: Crawl anytime, anywhere! Just look down and sneak to start crawling, and press space to stand back up!
body:
# EasyCrawl
Crawl anytime, anywhere! Just look down and sneak to start crawling, and press space to stand back up!

This datapack works with Minecraft versions 1.18 to 1.21.5


## How to use:
- To crawl, look down and sneak
- To stand up, press space or look up

## Features:
- Toggle crawling on/off for yourself with /trigger toggleCrawl
- Customize how far you must look down to start crawling with /trigger customizeCrawlAngles
- Manage the datapack via a user-friendly menu with /function ezcrawl:menu

## ⚠️ Optifine Users ⚠️
The regular resourcepack may not work with Optifine. Use this alternative resourcepack made by u/ChaosFile: [https://bit.ly/InvisibleShulkerPack](https://bit.ly/InvisibleShulkerPack)

## Planet Minecraft
EasyCrawl began on Planet Minecraft. You can find it at https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/crawling-datapack/
